featured_posts.title: iPhone 14 Pro (128GB) - Excellent Condition
featured_posts.description: Selling my iPhone 14 Pro in Space Black, 128GB. The phone is in excellent condition with no scratches on the screen or back. Always kept in a case and used with a screen protector. Battery health at 91%. Comes with original box and charging cable. Reason for sale: upgraded to a newer model.

Close to public transport, shops, and restaurants. Ideal for young professionals. Minimum 6-month lease required.

featured_posts.title: Part-Time Barista Needed
featured_posts.description: Independent coffee shop in Bristol is looking for a friendly and reliable part-time barista. Previous experience preferred but not required. Must be available on weekends. Duties include preparing drinks, handling customers, and maintaining cleanliness. Staff discounts included.

featured_posts.description: Beautiful solid oak dining table with four matching chairs. Lightly used and in great condition. Perfect for small families or apartments. Table dimensions: 140cm x 80cm. Collection only from Leeds.

featured_posts.title: 2015 Ford Fiesta - Low Mileage
featured_posts.description: 2015 Ford Fiesta in great condition with only 48,000 miles. Manual transmission, petrol engine, full service history, and MOT valid until next year. Recently serviced with new tyres fitted. Ideal first car, cheap to insure and run.

featured_posts.title: Professional Home Cleaning Service
featured_posts.description: Reliable and experienced cleaner offering home cleaning services in Glasgow. Services include regular cleaning, deep cleaning, and end-of-tenancy cleaning. All cleaning supplies provided. Flexible scheduling and competitive rates.

featured_posts.title: Men’s Leather Jacket (Medium)
